description: The Partisan Tissue Paper 3 Sheets have quality tissue paper, bleed resistant and acid-free. Ideal for gift wrap, arts and crafts and much more. Suitable for various festivals, birthday parties, bridal showers, baby showers, wedding gifts, handicrafts and etc. Made of high-quality paper. Comes in gold colour.
